todos.title: Convention 1: VSIX Architecture Deep Dive -- analyze extension.js 402 handling, copilotcli provider auth flow, quota enforcement paths. Document all 4 places HTTP 402 is checked and what triggers each.
Convention 2: Daemon Ecosystem Health Audit -- review all 16 daemons, identify which are running, which have stale PIDs, singleton enforcement integrity. Check skynet_daemon_status.py accuracy.
Convention 3: Delivery Pipeline Reliability Review -- audit ghost_type success rates, clipboard verify failures, FOCUS_STOLEN events. Trace dispatch_log.json for delivery patterns.
Convention 4: Score System Fairness Audit -- investigate why consultants have -0.08 scores. Trace all deductions. Verify dispatch evidence exists for every deduction. Check for systemic bias.
Convention 5: Bus Architecture Stress Analysis -- ring buffer overflow risk, spam filter accuracy, message loss patterns. Check bus_archive.jsonl completeness vs ring buffer.
Coding 1: Fix consultant negative scores -- reset illegitimate deductions without dispatch evidence. Implement guarded_publish in consultant boot scripts to prevent spam deductions.
Coding 2: Harden VSIX customizer -- add diff report, validation of modified package.json, test that copilotcli vendor when-gate removal persists after re-extract.
Coding 3: Improve worker boot verification -- add post-boot UIA scan loop that confirms all 4 workers are in Copilot CLI with correct model within 30s of boot completion.
Coding 4: Enhance skynet_scoring.py fairness -- add dispatch_evidence_required flag, prevent deductions without matching dispatch_log entries, add score recovery mechanism.
Coding 5: Dashboard truth metrics -- ensure all dashboard counters reflect real atomic values from Go backend, no client-side increments, show cache age on stale data.
Testing 1: VSIX roundtrip test -- extract skynet-copilot-chat.vsix, verify copilotcli when-gate removed, verify order=0, re-zip and compare hashes. Validate extension loads.
Testing 2: Daemon singleton test -- attempt to start each critical daemon twice, verify PID file prevents duplicates, verify signal handling on Windows (SIGBREAK).
Testing 3: Dispatch delivery test -- send test dispatch to each worker, verify _verify_delivery polls UIA correctly, check delivery status codes match expectations.
Testing 4: Score calculation test -- verify all score operations: +0.01 cross-validation, -0.01 low-value refactoring, -1.0 spam bypass. Test fair deduction rule rejects without evidence.
Testing 5: Bus spam filter test -- verify guarded_publish blocks duplicates within 900s, test server-side 429 response, verify fingerprint dedup window.
Cross-validation 1: Verify VSIX customizations are correct and complete -- independent review of vsix_customizer.py output vs original package.json.
Cross-validation 2: Verify daemon health audit findings -- independently check each daemon PID file and process liveness. Cross-check with skynet_daemon_status.py output.
Cross-validation 3: Verify delivery pipeline test results -- independently trace a dispatch from skynet_dispatch.py through ghost_type to worker UIA state transition.
Cross-validation 4: Verify score fairness audit -- independently recalculate all agent scores from worker_scores.json. Check every deduction has dispatch evidence.
Cross-validation 5: Verify bus spam filter tests -- independently send messages and confirm blocking behavior matches documented thresholds.
